Why It Works

Why Our
Supplements Work

01

Evidence-First Development

Every formula begins with peer-reviewed research. We don't follow trends — we follow data. Each active ingredient is selected based on clinical evidence of efficacy and bioavailability.

02

Branded & Patented Ingredients

We use trademarked, patented raw materials — not generic equivalents. This means consistent potency, verified sourcing, and the same results the clinical studies showed.

03

New Zealand Standard

Manufactured to pharmaceutical-grade standards in New Zealand facilities. Third-party tested for purity, potency, and safety before every batch reaches you.

Series 01 · BHB & Weight Management

How BHB Ketone Salts Shift Your Body Into Fat-Burning Mode

20 May 2025

Most weight management supplements chase a single lever — suppress appetite, block fat absorption, or spike metabolism. BHB (Beta-Hydroxybutyrate) works differently. It changes the fundamental fuel source your body prefers to burn, at the cellular level.

What Is BHB?

Beta-Hydroxybutyrate is a ketone body — a molecule your liver produces when carbohydrate availability drops. In a standard diet, your body runs primarily on glucose. When glucose is scarce (through fasting, carbohydrate restriction, or supplementation), your liver ramps up ketone production, and BHB becomes the dominant fuel for your brain, heart, and muscles.

Avenqor's BHB formula delivers exogenous ketone salts, meaning you can begin entering a ketogenic metabolic state without strict dietary deprivation.

"BHB doesn't just tell your body to burn fat — it gives your body a reason to. It's the signal and the fuel, simultaneously."

The Science of Fat Metabolism

When BHB levels rise in the bloodstream, several things happen concurrently:

  • Appetite suppression — BHB suppresses ghrelin, the hunger hormone, reducing caloric intake naturally
  • Fat oxidation — Elevated ketones signal adipose tissue to release stored fatty acids for energy
  • Muscle preservation — Unlike caloric restriction alone, BHB is protein-sparing, protecting lean muscle mass during a deficit
  • Mental clarity — The brain runs exceptionally well on ketones, often resulting in improved focus and reduced brain fog

Why Formulation Matters

Not all BHB products are equal. The mineral salt paired with BHB significantly affects absorption rate and tolerability. Avenqor uses a blend of sodium, magnesium, and calcium BHB salts — optimised for rapid uptake while maintaining electrolyte balance, a common concern with ketogenic diets.

Who Benefits Most?

BHB supplementation is particularly effective for individuals following a low-carbohydrate or ketogenic diet who want to deepen ketosis, those in the early stages of a weight management programme who struggle with energy dips and hunger, and active individuals seeking a clean, sustained energy source without glucose spikes.

As with any supplement, consistency is key. BHB works best as part of a broader lifestyle approach — not as a standalone solution, but as a powerful tool within one.

Series 02 · Blood Sugar Regulation

Why Postprandial Glucose Spikes Matter More Than Fasting Levels

15 May 2025

When most people think about blood sugar, they think about fasting glucose — the number on a morning blood test. But emerging research consistently shows that what happens to your blood sugar after a meal is a far more powerful predictor of long-term metabolic health.

The Postprandial Problem

Every time you eat carbohydrates, your blood glucose rises. The speed, height, and duration of that rise — and how quickly your body brings it back to baseline — determines whether your metabolism is functioning optimally or under chronic stress.

A sharp, prolonged spike followed by a steep crash isn't just uncomfortable. Over time, it contributes to insulin resistance, increased fat storage, chronic inflammation, and elevated cardiovascular risk.

"A person can have a 'normal' fasting glucose yet experience dramatic post-meal spikes that, cumulatively, drive metabolic dysfunction over years."

How Avenqor's Formula Works

Our blood sugar support complex targets multiple pathways simultaneously:

  • Berberine — Activates AMPK, the metabolic master switch, improving insulin sensitivity at the cellular level
  • Chromium picolinate — Enhances insulin receptor activity, supporting efficient glucose uptake
  • Cinnamon extract — Slows gastric emptying and inhibits alpha-glucosidase enzymes, flattening the glucose curve after meals
  • Alpha-lipoic acid — A potent antioxidant that reduces oxidative stress caused by glucose fluctuations

The Glucose Curve, Explained

Think of your blood sugar response as a curve on a graph. The goal isn't to eliminate the rise — some rise is natural and necessary. The goal is to keep the peak moderate and the recovery swift. Avenqor's formula is designed to do exactly this: blunt the spike without blocking normal glucose metabolism.

Beyond Diabetes

Blood sugar regulation isn't only relevant to diabetics or pre-diabetics. Even metabolically healthy individuals benefit from stable glucose — better energy levels, reduced cravings, improved sleep quality, and lower long-term disease risk. This formula is designed for anyone who takes their metabolic health seriously.

Series 03 · Sleep Formula

The 2-Phase Sleep Architecture and Why Deep Sleep Is Non-Negotiable

10 May 2025

Sleep is not a passive state. It is an active, highly orchestrated biological process — and the quality of that process determines everything from immune function to cognitive performance, body composition, and emotional regulation.

Understanding Sleep Architecture

A full night's sleep consists of multiple 90-minute cycles, each containing two primary phases: Non-REM (NREM) sleep and REM sleep. Within NREM, Stage 3 — also called slow-wave or deep sleep — is where the most critical restoration occurs.

  • Deep sleep (NREM Stage 3) — Physical repair, immune strengthening, growth hormone release, cellular detoxification
  • REM sleep — Memory consolidation, emotional processing, creativity, learning integration

Most adults get far less deep sleep than they need. Stress, blue light exposure, alcohol, and inconsistent sleep schedules all suppress slow-wave sleep — even if total sleep duration appears adequate.

"You can sleep eight hours and still be chronically sleep-deprived — if the architecture is disrupted, the restoration doesn't happen."

How Avenqor Sleep Formula Works

Rather than simply sedating you, our formula works with your body's natural sleep-wake system:

  • Melatonin (low-dose, timed release) — Signals circadian rhythm onset without suppressing natural melatonin production
  • Magnesium glycinate — Activates GABA receptors, reducing neurological arousal and supporting deep sleep onset
  • L-theanine — Promotes alpha brain wave activity, creating calm alertness that transitions into restful sleep
  • Ashwagandha extract (KSM-66®) — Adaptogen that lowers cortisol, the primary antagonist of deep sleep
  • 5-HTP — Precursor to serotonin, supporting healthy sleep-wake neurotransmitter balance

The Cortisol Connection

Elevated evening cortisol is one of the most common — and underappreciated — causes of poor sleep quality. When stress hormones remain high at night, the body resists entering deep sleep stages. Ashwagandha's cortisol-lowering effect addresses the root cause rather than masking the symptom.

What Good Sleep Actually Feels Like

With properly structured sleep, you wake before the alarm feeling genuinely rested — not just "not tired." Cognitive clarity arrives within minutes. Recovery from exercise is faster. Mood is more stable. These aren't aspirational outcomes; they're the normal results of sleep architecture functioning as it should.

Series 04 · High-Purity Fish Oil

Triglyceride vs Ethyl Ester: Which Form of Omega-3 Actually Absorbs?

5 May 2025

Walk into any pharmacy and you'll find dozens of fish oil products. Most look similar on the label — EPA and DHA milligrams prominently displayed. But the form of omega-3 inside those capsules varies enormously, and that difference has a profound impact on how much your body actually absorbs.

Two Forms, Very Different Results

Fish oil omega-3s come in two primary molecular forms: triglyceride (TG) and ethyl ester (EE). The distinction matters more than most consumers realise.

  • Triglyceride form — The natural form found in fish. Your body's digestive enzymes (lipases) are specifically designed to process triglycerides. Absorption is efficient, particularly with food.
  • Ethyl ester form — A synthetic, concentrated form created during molecular distillation. Cheaper to produce, but studies consistently show 25–70% lower bioavailability compared to triglyceride form.

"Many consumers are paying for omega-3s that their body cannot efficiently use. The label shows the dose — not the absorption."

The New Zealand Advantage

Avenqor sources its fish oil from deep, cold New Zealand and sub-Antarctic waters — among the most pristine marine environments on Earth. The cold water fish (predominantly hoki and tuna) naturally accumulate higher concentrations of EPA and DHA, and the remote sourcing location means significantly lower heavy metal and environmental contaminant exposure.

Every batch is third-party tested for:

  • Mercury, lead, cadmium, and arsenic
  • PCBs and dioxins
  • Oxidation levels (TOTOX value) — a measure of freshness that most brands don't disclose

Why Freshness Matters

Oxidised fish oil is not just ineffective — it may be actively harmful. Rancid omega-3s generate free radicals that contribute to the very inflammation you're trying to reduce. The "fishy burp" commonly associated with fish oil supplements is almost always a sign of oxidation. Avenqor's product is manufactured and encapsulated in an oxygen-minimised environment, and nitrogen-flushed before sealing.

Recommended Use

Take with the largest meal of the day for optimal absorption. Fat-soluble compounds are absorbed in the context of dietary fats — taking fish oil on an empty stomach significantly reduces uptake regardless of the form.

Series 05 · Krill Oil

How Phospholipid Omega-3s from Krill Reach Cells Fish Oil Cannot

29 Apr 2025

Krill oil and fish oil both deliver EPA and DHA — the two omega-3 fatty acids most associated with cardiovascular, cognitive, and anti-inflammatory benefits. But the way they deliver these fatty acids is fundamentally different, and that difference changes what your cells actually receive.

The Phospholipid Advantage

In fish oil, omega-3s are packaged as triglycerides. In krill oil, they're packaged as phospholipids — the same molecular structure that forms the membrane of every cell in your body.

This isn't a minor detail. Cell membranes are selectively permeable — they control what enters and exits the cell with extraordinary precision. Phospholipid-bound omega-3s are recognised and incorporated far more readily than triglyceride-bound ones, because they speak the same molecular language as the membrane itself.

"Think of phospholipid omega-3s as having a universal key to your cell membranes. Triglyceride omega-3s have to knock and wait."

Astaxanthin: Krill's Built-In Antioxidant

Antarctic krill naturally contain astaxanthin — one of the most potent antioxidants found in nature, responsible for krill's characteristic pink-red colour. This matters for omega-3 supplementation because:

  • Omega-3 fatty acids are highly susceptible to oxidation
  • Astaxanthin acts as an in-built preservative, protecting the EPA and DHA within the same capsule
  • Astaxanthin itself has independently studied benefits for skin health, exercise recovery, and eye health

No Fishy Aftertaste — and Why

The absence of fish oil's characteristic aftertaste in krill oil isn't just about palatability. It's a marker of oxidation status. Krill oil's natural antioxidant content keeps the fatty acids stable. If your omega-3 supplement has a strong fishy smell or taste, that's oxidation — and oxidised fats counteract the very benefits you're supplementing for.

Sustainability

Antarctic krill represent one of the largest biomasses on Earth and are harvested under some of the world's strictest fishery management regulations. Avenqor sources exclusively from Marine Stewardship Council (MSC) certified fisheries, ensuring that every capsule supports — rather than undermines — the ocean ecosystem it comes from.

Fish Oil vs Krill Oil: Which Should You Choose?

For most people, krill oil offers superior cellular uptake and comes with the added benefit of astaxanthin. For those requiring very high doses of EPA/DHA (such as therapeutic cardiovascular doses of 3–4g daily), high-concentration fish oil may be more economical. Both have a place — and Avenqor offers both, to the same standard of purity and integrity.
